title: wolfhsm-sys: duplicate rustc-link-lib for wolfhsm_shims
description: cc::Build::compile('wolfhsm_shims') automatically emits cargo:rustc-link-lib=static=wolfhsm_shims and cargo:rustc-link-search. The build.rs then also has an explicit println\!("cargo:rustc-link-lib=static=wolfhsm_shims"). This double-registers the library. While likely harmless today, it's incorrect and confusing. Remove the explicit println\!; rely solely on cc::Build::compile().
